caption: The video showcases a segment from a Madden NFL video game, focusing on the player card of Randall Cunningham, who has an overall rating of 90. The first frame displays his detailed attributes, including key stats like speed (SPD) at 91, passing accuracy (ACC) at 88, and throwing power (KPW) at 92. The player's general attributes such as height (6'4"), weight (212 lbs), and strength (STR) at 72 are also highlighted. In the second frame, the focus shifts to the history and description of the player card, indicating that Cunningham was acquired through a pack opening on December 29, 2022, for the Eagles team with UNLV as his college. The card is described as a MUT 23 Zero Chill Elite OOP, with a power archetype. Throughout the video, a person wearing headphones is seen reacting and discussing the player card, likely providing commentary or analysis. The festive background suggests the video might have been recorded during the holiday season.
